title: Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram
tagline: Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Vinnarasi Madha Church, officially known as Our Lady of Queen of Heaven Church, is a Roman Catholic quasi-parish church located in the village of Gopasandiram.
overview.description: The Vinnarasi Madha Church, officially known as Our Lady of Queen of Heaven Church, is a Roman Catholic quasi-parish church located in the village of Gopasandiram. It operates under the direct administration of the Dharmapuri Diocese.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Gopasandiram, Thally
topPlaces.description: Gobasandiram is a small village in Thally Block in Krishnagiri District of Tamil Nadu State, India. It comes under Kottamadugu Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Thally
topPlaces.description: Thally is a town near Kurubarapally Village in Thally Taluk, Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is "Little England" named so by the British during their regime mostly due to its cool weather.

topPlaces.name: Dasarapalli
topPlaces.description: Dasarapalli, also spelled Dasarapally, is a village located east of the village of Thally Kothanur in Tamil Nadu, India. It is five kilometers away from the town of Thally.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of the Rosary Church, Averipalli
topPlaces.description: Our Lady Of Holy Rosary Church is located in hamlets of Periya Averipally which is 6 km away from Thally. Originally it was a Sub-Parish church of Dasarapalli parish; later it became a mission church and in 2022 it became a Parish Church.

image.alt: Our Lady of the Rosary Church, Averipalli

topPlaces.name: Averipally, Thally
topPlaces.description: Averipally is a group of hamlets located 6 km away from Thally town in Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India. This village comes under Achubalu Panchayat within Denkanikottai taluk.

topPlaces.name: Madagondapalli
topPlaces.description: Madagondapalli is a village situated in the Denkanikottai taluk of Krishnagiri district in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Governed by the Madagondapalli Gram Panchayat, the village falls within the administrative of the Thally Block.

topPlaces.name: Sacred Heart Church, Madagondapalli
topPlaces.description: Sacred Heart Church, Madagondapall, is one of the earliest Catholic churches within the Dharmapuri Diocese, boasting a 143-year legacy. For over 96 years, it has served as a parish church, offering a sacred space for Catholics to gather in worship.

topPlaces.name: Muthyala Maduvu
topPlaces.description: Muthyalamaduvu is a tourist attraction located near Anekal, Bengaluru Urban, Karnataka. The place is also known as Pearl Valley.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (65 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram?
faq.a: Stays in Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gopasandiram, Thally, Thally, Dasarapalli, Our Lady of the Rosary Church, Averipalli, Averipally, Thally.
